Learn about the QueueModule, SnsService,: Learn about the QueueModule, SnsService, and SqsService for messaging in MBC CQRS Serverless.
The `QueueModule` provides messaging ser: The `QueueModule` provides messaging services for SNS (pub/sub) and SQS (queue) operations. It is registered as a global module, so `SnsService` and `SqsService` are available for injection throughout the application without explicitly importing `QueueModule`.
Publish to default topic (SNS_TOPIC_ARN: Publish to default topic (SNS_TOPIC_ARN env var)
Default topic ARN used when `topicArn` i: Default topic ARN used when `topicArn` is not provided
`SqsService` provides SQS send, receive,: `SqsService` provides SQS send, receive, and delete operations.
Sends a single message to an SQS queue.
Sends up to 10 messages in a single API: Sends up to 10 messages in a single API call. Caller is responsible for ensuring `entries.length <= 10`.
Receives messages from an SQS queue. Def: Receives messages from an SQS queue. Defaults to `MaxNumberOfMessages: 10` and `WaitTimeSeconds: 0`.
Deletes a single message from the queue: Deletes a single message from the queue after processing.
Deletes up to 10 messages in a single AP: Deletes up to 10 messages in a single API call.
Publishes a message to an SNS topic.
